title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Senior Teacher in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
